questions.question: What is the name of the Shinigami who intentionally drops his Death Note into the human world?
questions.explanation: Ryuk drops his Death Note because he is bored and wants to see what a human would do with it.

questions.question: What is the name of the genius detective who attempts to track down Kira?
questions.explanation: L (L Lawliet) is the world-renowned detective who leads the investigation against Kira.

questions.question: What alias does Light Yagami receive from the public as he performs his executions?
questions.explanation: The public and media dub the mysterious killer 'Kira' (derived from the English word 'killer').

questions.question: Which food is Ryuk famously obsessed with?
questions.explanation: Ryuk loves juicy human apples and goes into withdrawal (doing handstands) if he goes too long without them.

questions.question: Who becomes Light's primary successor-rival and head of the SPK after L's death?
questions.explanation: Near (Nate River) is the younger of L's two potential successors raised at Wammy's House, and he eventually solves the Kira case.
